topics.title: Declaração de Ajuste Anual (DAA)
topics.summary: Annual IRPF return due end of May (typically 31 May). Mandatory when taxable income >R$30,639.90 or specific asset/share conditions met.

topics.title: IRPF withholding + INSS
topics.summary: Employers withhold IRPF (0–27.5%) and INSS (7.5–14% progressive) monthly from payroll. eSocial is the unified reporting system.

topics.title: FGTS
topics.summary: Employers deposit 8% of salary monthly to the worker's FGTS account (severance fund). In termination without cause, 40% fine on accumulated balance.

topics.title: ICMS / IPI / PIS / COFINS
topics.summary: ICMS state-level VAT on goods (4–18% typical); IPI federal excise; PIS/COFINS federal social contributions. Tax-reform unifies these into CBS/IBS gradually from 2026.

topics.title: Lucro Real vs Lucro Presumido
topics.summary: Corporate tax options: Lucro Real (actual profit) mandatory above R$78m turnover; Lucro Presumido (presumed profit) below threshold — simpler calc. IRPJ 15% + 10% over R$240k/yr + CSLL 9%.
